name: YouTube Video
description: Play YouTube videos fullscreen with multi-video support, playback controls, and quality settings.

schema.name: videos
schema.label: YouTube URLs or Video IDs
schema.description:
One video per line. Optionally add start and end times (in seconds) after the URL, separated by spaces. Examples:
https://youtu.be/VIDEOID1
https://youtu.be/VIDEOID2 30
https://youtu.be/VIDEOID3 60 120
(second example starts at 0:30, third plays from 1:00 to 2:00)

schema.name: playback_mode
schema.label: Playback Order
schema.description: Sequential plays videos in order; Random picks a different video each time.

schema.name: mute
schema.label: Mute Audio
schema.description: Mute the video. Required by most browsers for autoplay.

schema.name: loop
schema.label: Loop Video
schema.description: Replay the current video instead of advancing to the next playlist item.

schema.name: start
schema.label: Default Start At (seconds)
schema.description: Start all videos at this point by default. Can be overridden per-video in the URL list above. 0 = beginning.

schema.name: end
schema.label: Default End At (seconds)
schema.description: Stop all videos at this point by default. Can be overridden per-video in the URL list above. 0 = play to the end.

schema.name: quality
schema.label: Preferred Quality
schema.description: Preferred video quality. YouTube may override based on bandwidth.

schema.name: video_duration
schema.label: Duration Per Video (seconds)
schema.description: Max time to spend on each video. 0 = play each video fully before advancing.

schema.name: controls
schema.label: Show YouTube Controls
schema.description: Show the native YouTube playback controls bar.

schema.name: cc
schema.label: Show Captions
schema.description: Enable closed captions / subtitles if available.

schema.name: privacy_mode
schema.label: Privacy-Enhanced Mode
schema.description: Load via youtube-nocookie.com to reduce tracking cookies.

schema.name: rel
schema.label: Show Related Videos
schema.description: Show related video suggestions when the video ends.

schema.name: branding
schema.label: Modest Branding
schema.description: Reduce the YouTube logo watermark on the player.
